actionUnits.condition: We need to simulate collecting stars so that Scoremanager.changescore(int) is invoked until score == winAmount (2) to trigger winlosescript.Winlevel(). However, ScoreManager has no Collider/Rigidbody/EventTrigger and changescore requires an int parameter, so it cannot be called via the allowed Trigger action. Please provide the interactable star objects (or a parameterless wrapper on ScoreManager, e.g., AddStar() calling changescore(StarValue)), or any UnityEvent m_Calls wiring that invokes changescore.
